meaning: v.跳伞运动员在降落伞张开前做空中造型动作
examples: I used to skydive off buildings in south county.
The Tandem skydive is also a very common way to experience skydiving.
Pharr wants to jump again, but it looks like his first skydive will be his last.
People in Jersey can become the first to do a skydive from 15, 000ft (4, 500m) above the island.
In October, the Austrian Felix Baumgartner daredeviled his way into the record books with a 24-mile, soundbreaking skydive.
